name: East Texas 12-Month Fixed Rate (composite REP plan)

provenance.notes: COMPOSITE plan, not a specific REP's EFL. Delivery side is FILED: Oncor residential TDU rates, Jul 2025 column of Oncor's official 2025 rate sheet — fixed $4.23/mo ($1.43 customer charge + $2.80 metering) in fixed_monthly_usd, volumetric 5.1248 c/kWh (Distribution 2.5344 + TCRF 1.8796 + Nuclear Decomm 0.0199 + EECRF 0.1137 + DCRF 0.5772) in riders_usd_per_kwh; in effect 2025-05-13..2025-08-31 (stepped to 5.6032 c/kWh 2025-09-01); corroborated by bkvenergy.com/learning-center/historical-tdu-delivery-charges/. Energy charge 10.0 c/kWh is ESTIMATED: reconstructed as published Jul-2025 Oncor-area average all-in retail 15.47 c/kWh (electricchoice.com/electricity-prices-by-state/texas/dallas/; EIA TX Jul-2025 avg ~15.36) minus the filed Oncor delivery (~5.55 c/kWh at 1000 kWh). No clean Jul-2025-dated flat EFL was retrievable in 2026 (REPs overwrite EFLs); real named 2025-era plans (e.g. Reliant Secure Advantage 12, Gexa Eco Saver Plus) had comparable all-in but only 2026 quotes or bill-credit structures. REP base charge assumed $0 (many flat plans); fixed_monthly_usd holds only the Oncor fixed charges.
